since_last: 64% of 89 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +5.03%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 64% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.68% · BTC -3.18% · Gold +0.53% · Nasdaq100 +1.49%. 64% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +5.03%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, Data Center, Power & Energy lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +5.03%; weakest is Data Center, Power & Energy at -0.62%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AMBA is the standout at +25.13%
cards.body: Leaders: AMBA +25.13%, AVAV +15.58%, KLAC +7.18%, VRT +7.03%, AMD +6.87%. Laggards: DLR -5.31%, TTD -3.54%, PINS -3.45%, HON -3.30%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +3.97% at $170.71
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +3.97% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
